modelfitter 0.0.0.9033
  • Reference

Forest plot from a set of bootstrapped models

Source: R/deprecated.R
plot_regression.Rd

Usage

plot_regression(
  boots,
  facet = NULL,
  stat_label = "Odds Ratio",
  report_fit = FALSE,
  limit = c(NA, NA),
  p.component = FALSE,
  label_fn = ~.x
)

Arguments

boots

a set of bootstrapped model fits as output by run_models

facet

a faceting variable (usually `modelName“)

stat_label

what to call the x axis

report_fit

which components of the model performance statistics do we want to report

limit

x axis limits

p.component

indicate which component parts of the fit are significant and which are not

label_fn

a function (or lambda) that accepts an vector and returns a vector

Value

a ggplot

On this page
